# 4.4 Data Preprocessing Steps
Describe each preprocessing step taken, with justification:
1.	Handling missing values (imputation strategy or removal)
2.	Encoding categorical variables (Label Encoding / One-Hot Encoding)
3.	Feature scaling / normalization (StandardScaler, MinMaxScaler)
4.	Handling class imbalance (SMOTE, oversampling, class weights)
5.	Train / test split rationale (e.g., 80/20 split, random seed)
